Dear family & friends
Please join us to celebrate our wedding on August 11, 2026, at 1 pm at Lewes Register Office
The Evelyn Room · The Grange, Southover Road, Lewes BN7 1TP
Guests seated by 12:40 pm · Wedding lunch to follow

From South Africa to Slovakia to the South Downs — we can’t wait to gather our favourite people in one of England’s loveliest market towns for an afternoon of vows, good food and better company.

until we say “I do”

Guest list & invitations

Wedding menu

Enter each course, one dish per line. Save, then email attending guests their personal menu link.

Menu order — what to order

Log in and add a menu to see counts.

Email sending (Brevo)

Create a free account at brevo.com, verify your sender address, and paste an API key here. Emails are then sent with tracking, and Refresh metrics shows Delivered / Opened / Clicked per guest. Without a key, Send opens your own mail app instead (marked as sent manually, no tracking).

Edit website information

Saved:

This single-file site stores RSVPs in each visitor’s browser. Add a webhook endpoint (e.g. Formspree — free) so every RSVP is also delivered to you centrally, or ask your planner to publish the hosted version.
